asciiStrings: Clear the stage in 3 minutes to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Infantryman Unit Card.
!cffffffThe enemy Knolls have low stats, but they can be threatening in groups. !c00ffffUse your hero!cffffff to eliminate them before they gather.
Defend your tower perfectly against enemy attacks to receive a bonus reward: 100 Gold.
!cffffffInfantrymen are incapable of fighting alone. !c00ffffAllocate at least!cffffff !c00ffff2 or more Infantrymen!cffffff at the same time for maximum results.
Upgrade your population for 1 or more times while in the stage to receive a bonus reward: Level  1 Panzer Unit Card.
!cffffffTo deal with an army of enemies, !c00ffffyou must upgrade!cffffff !c00ffffyour population at the Tower menu!cffffff.
Use your hero to kill an enemy and steal mana. The higher the Skill Level is, the more mana stolen.
Increase your hero's  Long-ranged Attack Strength, even while defending the tower.
This basic unit of the Hume is inferior in combat, but consumes little mana.
This ironclad soldier moves very slowly, but provides high Defense, an advantage over lightweight horsemen units like Cavalry and Scouts.
This unit has fast Movement and Attack Speeds, making it ideal to deal with low-defense units or to raid the enemy tower.
